details.test: Task 1: Save beginner safety articles under 8 minutes to Favorites
Task 2: Complete and save pontoon day trip safety checklist
Task 3: Use boat capacity calculator and save trip plan
Task 4: Search filtered article and open print friendly view
Task 5: Add cheapest basic boating safety course to training plan
Task 6: Set up monthly maintenance schedule for 2-stroke engine in saltwater
Task 7: Build three-step learning path from different categories
Task 8: Create study list with radio distress call terms
